home.selectIdentityDesc: Please select the user type that best fits your needs so we can provide you with a personalized service experience
home.assetPartyDesc: Individual or corporate real estate holders who upload asset information and put assets on the blockchain
home.evaluatorDesc: Evaluation companies responsible for verifying asset information
home.lawOfficeDesc: Professional institutions providing legal services, compliance review, and legal opinions

evaluator.title: Evaluator Institution Registration
evaluator.agreeAMLTerms: I have read and agree to the Anti-Money Laundering Statement Terms
evaluator.followLaws: Commit to comply with relevant laws and regulations
evaluator.uploadSignedAML: Click or drag the signed statement file here to upload
evaluator.serviceAgreementContent: This agreement is jointly signed by the evaluation institution (hereinafter referred to as "Party A") and the platform operator (hereinafter referred to as "Party B")... Party A undertakes to comply with relevant national laws and regulations and provide true and effective evaluation services... Party B is responsible for providing technical support and platform services to ensure the fairness and transparency of the evaluation process...
evaluator.officePhotosDesc: Supports JPG format, size not exceeding 5MB, optional supporting proof
evaluator.enterEmailErrorPlaceholder: Please enter a valid email format
evaluator.uploadChiefAppraiserCert: Please upload the chief appraiser qualification certificate
evaluator.uploadAppraisalCert: Please upload the appraisal qualification certificate
evaluator.readAMLTerms: Please read and agree to the anti-money laundering statement terms
evaluator.uploadAMLStatement: Please upload the anti-money laundering statement document

lawOffice.title: Law Office Registration
lawOffice.uploadOfficeLicense: Click to upload law office license
lawOffice.agreeTerms: I have read and agree to all terms and conditions of the Legal Service Compliance Agreement
lawOffice.agreeNotarization: I agree to notarize the signed confirmation report on the blockchain and understand the immutability and legal validity of blockchain notarization
lawOffice.notice1: After submitting the registration application, the platform will review within 3-5 business days
lawOffice.notice2: After approval, you will obtain the platform-certified law office qualification
lawOffice.notice3: Please ensure that the provided information is true and valid, and bear corresponding legal responsibilities if false
lawOffice.fileSupport: Supports JPG, PNG, PDF format, size not exceeding 10MB
lawOffice.officeNamePlaceholder: Please enter the law firm name
lawOffice.licenseNumberPlaceholder: Please enter the law firm license number
lawOffice.licenseNoPlaceholder: Please enter the lawyer’s license number
lawOffice.specializationPlaceholder: Please select the area of specialization
lawOffice.uploadOfficeLicenseError: Please upload the scanned copy of the law firm license
lawOffice.uploadLawyerLicenseError: Please upload the scanned copy of the lawyer’s license
lawOffice.uploadBarProofError: Please upload the bar membership certificate
lawOffice.readServiceAgreement: Please read and agree to the Legal Service Compliance Agreement
